# Zapia

> Fast, reliable, and affordable web hosting — designed, built, and operated in France.

Zapia is a French web hosting and web design company. We offer managed hosting plans (NVMe SSD, unlimited bandwidth, free SSL, daily backups) and custom website design & development services. All infrastructure is located in France and fully GDPR-compliant.

## Services

### Web Hosting
- NVMe SSD hosting — up to 20× faster than traditional hard drives
- Unlimited bandwidth on all plans
- Free SSL certificates (Let's Encrypt, auto-renewing)
- Daily automated backups (7 / 30 / 60 days depending on plan)
- DDoS protection (enterprise-grade, built-in)
- Global CDN (30+ edge locations)
- Unlimited databases (MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL)
- Real-time analytics (built-in, no third-party tools required)
- Support for Node.js, Python, Ruby, PHP; Docker on Business plan
- HTTP/3 and QUIC protocol support
- Built-in Redis object cache
- Brotli compression on all static assets
- 99.9% uptime SLA

### Pricing
- Monthly and annual plans available (annual = 2 months free)
- 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked
- No hidden fees, no contracts

### Custom Website Design
- Full-service web design and development
- Mobile-first, fully responsive
- SEO-optimised from day one
- Hosting included (Zapia Pro plan)
- Support 365 days a year
- Custom pricing based on project scope

## Infrastructure & Compliance
- All servers located exclusively in France
- Data never leaves EU borders
- Full GDPR (Règlement Général sur la Protection des Données) compliance
- French data protection law (loi Informatique et Libertés)
- TLS encryption in transit, AES-256 at rest
- Operated by a French team

## Company
- Name: Zapia
- Country: France
- Contact: contact@zapia.fr
- Website: https://zapia.fr
- Languages: French (primary), English
